data.raceComments: {"comment":"2. SANTANA BOY has a strong record this track and trip with six wins and three placings from 14 starts. Scored by a neck last time (16.68) in a Grade 5 H over 300m at this track. Appeals as a leading chance in this. 3. HIGH END CASH has shown good improvement at his last two starts, the latest scoring at this track over 300m. Form from his last run is proving to be solid. Expecting another bold showing. 1. ASTON LYON goes very well at the course and distance with six wins and a placing from 11 starts. Recorded a one length win (16.80) in a Grade 5 H last time at this track. Looks a key chance on best figures. 6. FIND THE SUN comes off a (16.67) win last time, scoring by 3.5 lengths in a Grade 5 H over 300m at this track. Already a winner from this draw.","runners":[2,3,1,6],"exclusive":false}
